questions.q: Which teammate almost drowned their sibling with an egg?
questions.why: It was 🐦‍⬛ Crow. Ask them to tell the story — it's better in person than in print.

questions.q: Which teammate goes to bed at 7pm every single day?
questions.why: 🦦 Otter. An admirable commitment to sleep hygiene. We respect it.

questions.q: Which teammate has performed in an opera?
questions.why: 🪶 Heron. They will not be performing today, despite popular demand.

questions.q: Which teammate once quit their job to join a monastery and live in the mountains?
questions.why: 🦊 Fox. The mountains were great. The monastery was, by their own account, harder.

questions.q: Which teammate has met an MLB Hall of Famer?
questions.why: 🐺 Wolf. There is, of course, a photograph. They will absolutely show you the photograph.
